memo: BWV147 163-event sequence on 34-key Lingting C Major. No performance mistakes. Same score as kalimba-17-c-bwv147-sequence-163-01. Different instrument (34-key Lingting) may produce different harmonic content due to additional sympathetic resonance from the upper-layer tines. First multi-layer kalimba fixture; promoted to completed at 163/163 (100%).
